proposal_summary: Lists MaticX on the Aave v3 Polygon Pool as collateral, configuring risk parameters, interest rate strategies, eMode settings, and a 6M supply cap.

disclosed_entities.name: MaticX
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Llama proposes listing MaticX on the Aave v3 Polygon Pool. MaticX is an ERC20 receipt token

claimed_actions.raw_action: add MaticX as collateral and set risk parameters
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Enables users to deposit MaticX as collateral and configures LTV to 50%, Liquidation Threshold to 65%, Liquidation Bonus to 10%, and Reserve Factor to 20%.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: MaticX will be added as collateral... Risk Parameters: Collateral: Yes Borrowing: No LTV: 50% Liquidation Threshold: 65% Liquidation Bonus: 10% Reserve Factor: 20%

claimed_actions.raw_action: connect Chainlink oracle price source to AaveOracle
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Sets the price feed for MaticX on Aave V3.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: connect the Chainlink oracle price source to AaveOracle

claimed_actions.raw_action: add Matrix to the 'Matic correlated' eMode
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Configures eMode parameters for MaticX (LTV: 92.5%, Liquidation Threshold: 95%, Liquidation Bonus: 1%).
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Matrix will be added to the 'Matic correlated' eMode... 'MATIC correlated' eMode Parameters: LTV: 92.5% Liquidation Threshold: 95% Liquidation Bonus: 1%
A SupplyCap of $6M will be implemented

claimed_complexity.reason: This is a standard Aave V3 asset listing proposal consisting of a pre-tested ProposalPayload contract configuring reserve parameters.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: All the components involved in this proposal (tokens' implementations, interest rate strategy, oracle feed, proposal payload) have been tested and reviewed

limitations: No specific smart contract functions or ABIs are explicitly mentioned in the proposal text, only general configuration outcomes.
